title: Supreme Commander (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Commander}}
[[File:SupremeCommander-CWCS.png|thumb|right|250px|[[General]] [[Grievous]] was Supreme Commander of the Droid Army]]
'''Supreme Commander''' was a [[Wikipedia:Primus inter pares|high rank]] borne by military and paramilitary officers in the service of most of the major galactic powers of the Imperial and post-Imperial eras. It was similar to the title of [[Commander-in-Chief]]. As most major states and powers of these eras used at least one version of this rank, full information is divided among several pages:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)|'''Supreme commander of the Imperial military''']] — used by the senior-most [[Imperial officer|officer]] of [[Imperial High Command]], and held direct control over the [[Imperial Military|Imperial Armed Forces]]. It was once held by [[Grand General]] [[Cassio Tagge]].
**'''[[Supreme commander of the Imperial fleet]]''' — the title used by the [[Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] following the [[Cylo Hijacking]].
*'''[[Supreme Commander (Mon Cala)|Supreme Commander]]''' — used by the [[King of Mon Cala]], who led the [[Mon Cala planetary defense services|defense forces]] of the [[Mon Calamari monarchy|monarchy]].
*'''[[Supreme commander (New Republic)|Supreme commander]]''' — used by an official within the [[New Republic]].
*'''[[Supreme Commander of the Alliance Armed Forces]]''' — used by an official within the [[Alliance Military|Alliance Armed Forces]] who, along with only the [[Chancellor (Rebel Alliance)|Alliance Chief of State]], could award the [[Kalidor Crescent]].
*'''[[Supreme fleet commander]]''' — used by [[Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar]] in the [[Rebel Alliance Navy|Alliance Fleet]].
*'''[[Supreme Martial Commander of the Separatist Droid Armies]]''' — used by the leader of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]] [[Confederacy military|armed forces]]. It was held by [[General]] [[Grievous]] throughout the [[Clone Wars]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Alliance Supreme Commander]]''' — title used by the [[Chief of State (Alliance)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
*'''[[Supreme Allied Commanders]]''' — title used by senior Rebel Alliance military personnel that led one of the branches of the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Alliance Military]].
**[[Supreme fleet commander/Legends|'''Supreme Commander of the Rebel Fleet''']] — a title used by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]].
*'''[[Supreme Commander (Jedi)|Supreme Commander]]''' — used by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Galactic War]].
*'''[[Supreme Commander (Mon Cala)/Legends|Supreme Commander]]''' — used by the [[King of Mon Cala/Legends|King of Mon Cala]].
*'''[[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]]''' — used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s [[warrior caste]].
*'''[[Supreme commander of the Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]]''' — used by the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] for the leader of the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]].
*'''[[Supreme Commander of the Confederation military]]''' — title used by the leader of the [[Confederation Fleet]].
*'''[[Supreme Commander of the Corellian Defense Force]]''' — title used by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] as leader of the [[Corellian Home Fleet]].
*[[Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies/Legends|'''Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies''']] — used by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist Alliance]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
*'''[[Supreme Commander (Vagaari)|Supreme Commander]]''' — used by the leader of the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] armed forces.
*'''[[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]]''' — used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
*'''[[Supreme Commander (Republic)|Supreme Commander of the Republic Military]]''' — the title given to the leader of the [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic Military]].

==See also==
*[[Commander-in-Chief]]
